task: View the list of the Most Popular TV on rotten tomatoes.
final_result_response:
I navigated to https://www.rottentomatoes.com/ and then to the Most Popular TV section at https://www.rottentomatoes.com/browse/tv_series_browse/sort:popular. Here is the list of the Most Popular TV Shows (March 2026):

| # | TV Show | 🍅 Tomatometer | 🍿 Audience Score |
|---|---------|---------------|------------------|
| 1 | Invincible | 99% | 92% |
| 2 | One Piece | 93% | 95% |
| 3 | Jury Duty | 88% | 96% |
| 4 | Rooster | 88% | 63% |
| 5 | Imperfect Women | 41% | 32% |
| 6 | DTF St. Louis | 88% | 78% |
| 7 | Scarpetta | 58% | 46% |
| 8 | Deadloch | 100% | 88% |
| 9 | The Madison | 59% | 75% |
| 10 | Paradise | 88% | 82% |
| 11 | Young Sherlock | 83% | 82% |
| 12 | BAIT | 100% | — |
| 13 | Dark Winds | 100% | 78% |
| 14 | Marshals | 44% | 28% |
| 15 | Love Story | 80% | 71% |
| 16 | Unfamiliar | 80% | 69% |
| 17 | Daredevil: Born Again | 87% | 78% |
| 18 | The Comeback | 82% | 87% |
| 19 | The Pitt | 97% | 86% |
| 20 | Vladimir | 74% | 58% |
| 21 | The Night Agent | 82% | 67% |

Notable highlights: Deadloch, BAIT, and Dark Winds all have a perfect 100% Tomatometer, while Jury Duty leads in audience approval at 96%.

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user asked the agent to view the list of Most Popular TV shows on Rotten Tomatoes. Success means navigating to the correct section on the site and retrieving/presenting the list of popular TV shows.

**Output Assessment:** The agent navigated to https://www.rottentomatoes.com/, clicked the TV shows link, reached https://www.rottentomatoes.com/browse/tv_series_browse/sort:popular (the Most Popular TV sorted page), and extracted a formatted table of 21 TV shows with Tomatometer and Audience Score percentages. The page title showed "Best TV Shows (March 2026)" sorted by popularity.

**Evidence:** Step files confirm the agent navigated to the correct URL (sort:popular TV browse page), analyzed the page content in steps 3 and 5, and successfully extracted 21 shows with their ratings. Step 5 contains the full extraction matching the final response. The execution integrity status is "healthy" with no errors. The agent correctly reached and read the Most Popular TV content.

**Summary:** The agent successfully navigated to the Most Popular TV page on Rotten Tomatoes and extracted a complete, detailed list of 21 shows with ratings. Step files confirm the agent actually reached and read the source page, providing strong evidence of task completion.
